notes: Initial public seed for SolutionOS.
Canonical repository configured as https://github.com/coastalgit/solution-os.git.
0.1.2 adds vault manifests and read-only migration assessment for existing projects.
0.1.3 makes the triage README operational instead of merely descriptive.
0.1.4 adds the native Claude Code /sos skill router.
0.1.5 adds visible Claude Code SOS branch commands and removes personal names from command-facing metadata.
0.1.6 corrects help back to the concrete SOS baseline, adds /sos:tools and /sos:ingest, and removes /sos:toolkits-summary.
0.1.7 splits /sos:help quick reference from /sos:about explanatory intent and ensures help/about/summary surface SOS version.
0.1.8 trims /sos:about to a shorter explanation.
0.1.9 ships read-only helper scripts inside installed nodes under .claude/sos/scripts.
0.1.10 defines the SOS surface routing contract and audits PM/adapters for reachability.
0.1.11 clarifies the self-hosted repository model and adds curated product history to the vault.
0.1.12 clarified source-repository boundaries.
0.1.13 makes the GitHub-backed sos CLI package the primary install/update interface and expands triage gate choices.

0.1.14 adds actor registry protection, concept-binding, aliases, semantic audit warnings, no-overwrite version-safe install guards, archive/unarchive lifecycle controls, a guided /sos:assistant front door, and a local SOS visual map.

0.1.15 makes sos install proposal-first, adds explicit --yes/--apply approval for missing-file creation, and clarifies older-node upgrades as append-only opportunities rather than refresh/repair passes.

0.1.16 adds the tool-naming discipline rule and promotes .claude/TOOLS.md to a structured adopted-tools registry with vetted/unverified/parked/rejected/deprecated states, capability statements, and last-verified dates, blocking agents from naming unregistered tools or promoting parked entries to primary/preferred.

0.1.17 adds the /sos:presentation-generate command (NLM-driven outputs via the global nlm-presentation skill), the .claude/sos/produce/<type>/ output-config pattern, the /resources/ private input lane (Git-ignored, auto-created on install), and install-time append-only handling for existing .gitignore plus root context-file detection hints (README/PRD/etc.).

0.1.18 strips the agent-driven /sos:init and /sos:audit theatre. Init becomes a four-step concise flow (create missing files, ensure /resources/ lane, scan root for context files with one-line-per-file ingest prompt, three-line summary). Audit becomes a strictly read-only five-line state report — no multi-tier repair proposals, no Tier-A/B enumerations, no choice menus. Resources/README.md trimmed from 30 lines to 6. Workshop-demo-friendly output, no scrolling agent commentary.
0.1.19 adds guided /sos:spec for local and issue-backed feature spec packs.
0.2.0 introduces the tool-neutral .sos project core, always-created .sos-user home, versioned adapter shims, concise local change logging, and framework/task-adapter metadata hooks.
